MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Donna Liu, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Thanh Khuu, is present.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schronenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
